textByHashes.26aa5c91dd4146df85e2f2a337f80ae7a9e70d2a: Me's not got no glug-glugs to sell, yous bring me da sickies glug-glug den me's open da stufsies for ya.
textByHashes.9cbaac8a20da5ccb2ff32e1f43a7f8c4970769ff: Yous creatures done da good fing...yous get many bright pretties for dis...!
textByHashes.8970fa203ea33f10ebea558eca800327785c725a: Grish, you's is fright da creatures! Leave it alone!
textByHashes.8b5d41fe1825dc45bbc7d0e465836263feac8d83: But it's not da big yumsies when it's gone to all frighty...
textByHashes.2e60f8b2906172e5212d26352cf806e8673bb9a1: Dem's dead ogre's come out of da ground...dey's makin' da rest of us into sick-uns ...and dead-uns.
textByHashes.ff9b70295d1de087b3df1f5276b90f54fe9ab2e8: Grish want's da person go down der - see what's what!
textByHashes.e16d1b063845f822c8e31af44ef7ef73a3cfe46a: Hey yous creature...yous did good fings gedin that glug-glugs for da sickies! All is ogries pepels are not gettin dead cos of you.
textByHashes.be30fb4f73d3b71158c6e62d3260f99d78c6ee29: Me's showin' you da stufsies for yous creatures!
textByHashes.7376d14df44346aaf8876c2be6633fa9c2ee9531: Yous creatures is da funny ones...yous already solds me's ones now..and us can now sell un to yous!
textByHashes.50db7866e7040fcaea33b80c64fad9ab422303b0: I's gots a thinky number puzzley for yous!
textByHashes.a41ce9877f08b69cbc5218db676251f681c720c9: I's thinks yous needs to thinks again.
